items.headline: Billionaire Brad Gerstner Dumped All of His Alphabet Then Bought 2 Stocks Nobody Expected
items.summary: Brad Gerstner’s Altimeter Capital fully exited its entire 519,290-share Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) position in Q1 2026, according to the firm’s 13F filed May 15, 2026 (SEC CIK 0001541617).
